value.found_quote: A **plugin** is a self-contained directory of components that extends Claude Code with custom functionality. Plugin components include skills, agents, hooks, MCP servers, LSP servers, and monitors.
value.rationale: The page describes a "plugin" system in Claude Code (by Anthropic) that is explicitly a packaged, reusable extension mechanism. Plugins are self-contained, installable bundles of capabilities (skills, agents, hooks, MCP servers, LSP servers, monitors) that the agent can load — matching the claim of "packaged reusable extensions" that bundle "reusable capabilities/instructions the agent can load." The page provides a full technical reference, CLI commands, and schemas, indicating this is an active, generally available feature.
